summary_text:
### 修正対象 [`scripts/fugue-execute.mjs`](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs) 前提として、`auto-review.js` の `passed` はレビュー実行失敗時でも `true` を返すため、「auto-review passes (>=5/7)」は `score >= 5` で判定する実装に寄せました。影響範囲は `fugue-execute.mjs` のレビュー分岐と done criteria のみです。 ### 修正内容（diff形式） ```diff diff --git a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs index 9f0a13ca..549f4fb4 100644 --- a/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs +++ b/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-execute.mjs @@ -2,9 +2,11 @@ import { appendFileSync, existsSync, mkdirSync, readFileSync, renameSync, writeFileSync } from "node:fs"; import { spawn } from "node:child_process"; import { createHash, randomUUID } from "node:crypto"; +import { createRequire } from "node:module"; import os from "node:os"; import path from "node:path"; import process from "node:process"; +import idempotencyModule from "./lib/idempotency.js"; import outputFilterModule from "./lib/output-filter.js"; const HOME = os.homedir(); @@ -17,6 +19,9 @@ const PROVIDER_STATE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "fugue-provider-state.json"); const PHASE_EVIDENCE = path.join(STATE_DIR, "phase-evidence.jsonl"); const BRIDGE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "fugue-lane-bridge.mjs"); const VOTE = path.join(SCRIPT_DIR, "consensus-vote.js"); +const require = createRequire(import.meta.url); +const { autoReview, PASS_THRESHOLD: AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD } = require("./lib/auto-review.js"); +const { checkCache, storeCache, DEFAULT_TTL_MS } = idempotencyModule; const { redactSecrets } = outputFilterModule; function usage(exitCode = 1) { @@ -185,6 +190,7 @@ function buildRequirementsPacket(task, meta) { done_criteria: { syntax_check: true, unit_test: true, + auto_review_min_score: AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD, code_review_min_score: 7, integration_test: true, }, @@ -439,7 +445,7 @@ function parseReviewScore(text) { async function reviewImplementation(runState, implementationText) { return runBridge(runState, "single", { lane: "codex:code-reviewer", - task: `Review this output and score it out of 7 as JSON:
${implementationText}`, + task: `Review this output and score it out of 10 as JSON:
${implementationText}`, timeoutMs: 180000, }); } @@ -454,7 +460,7 @@ async function runCheck(project, command, args) { return { pass: result.code === 0, detail: summarize(`${result.stdout}
${result.stderr}`, 400) }; } -async function doneCriteria(runState, reviewScore) { +async function doneCriteria(runState, autoReviewScore, reviewScore) { const scripts = packageScripts(runState.project); const syntaxTargets = (runState.changedFiles || []).filter((file) => /\.(?:[cm]?js)$/i.test(file)); let syntax = { pass: false, detail: "No created/modified JS files tracked" }; @@ -477,9 +483,10 @@ async function doneCriteria(runState, reviewScore) { return { syntax_check: syntax, unit_test: unit, + auto_review: { pass: autoReviewScore >= AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD, score: autoReviewScore, minimum: AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD }, code_review: { pass: reviewScore >= 7, score: reviewScore, minimum: 7 }, integration_test: integration, - pass: syntax.pass && unit.pass && reviewScore >= 7 && integration.pass, + pass: syntax.pass && unit.pass && autoReviewScore >= AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD && reviewScore >= 7 && integration.pass, }; } @@ -536,15 +543,46 @@ async function continueRun(runState) { if (state.tier >= 3) { await maybeVote(state, `implementation-${attempt + 1}`, "Implementation batch completed", "Tier 3+ file-level equivalent gate", async () => {}); } + const autoReviewResult = await autoReview(implementation.summary, { + agent: "implementer", + task: state.task, + runId: state.runId, + }); + if (autoReviewResult.score < AUTO_REVIEW_PASS_THRESHOLD) { + state = saveState(state, { + phase: "review", + reviewResult: { + autoReview: autoReviewResult, + autoScore: autoReviewResult.score, + codexReview: null, + codexScore: -1, + score: -1, + }, + }); + recordPha...
